query: amateur snapshot with crooked tilted horizon, accidentally rotated photo, off-kilter handheld shot
message: composition_and_structure / unconventional_framing — anti_aesthetic. Off-kilter, dutch-angle, accidentally rotated handheld snapshots with informal vernacular framing. Includes parties, sports wipeouts, fallen signs, casual portraiture, awkward angles.

response.objective_caption: A row of small American flags attached to white wooden posts, each paired with a yellow rose, recedes diagonally across a grassy area with people standing in the background.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A row of small American flags on white posts paired with yellow roses recedes across a grassy area, captured with shallow depth of field that renders the nearest flag and rose relatively sharp while the background flags, grass, and surrounding people dissolve into soft, out-of-focus blur.
